description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a casual urban appearance. The individual has shoulder-length hair and wears glasses, a long-sleeve pullover with a graphic print, and fitted pants. The figure's stance is upright with arms slightly extended outward, suggesting a neutral or idle pose. The shoes are low-top and appear comfortable for walking, suitable for city environments. The overall build is slender, and the facial features are simplified, consistent with a cartoon or anime-inspired style. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing fits closely to the body.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian with glasses, a graphic pullover, fitted pants, and low-top shoes in a casual upright stance.
description_view_0: Front view showing glasses, graphic pullover, and facial features with arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, hair length, and the fit of the pullover and pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hair, pullover, and pants, with arms outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, similar to the left, with visible shoe and hand details.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve pullover with graphic print and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended outward
